message:
feat(cli): add verbose mode with live daemon status for workers list

Enhances `rch workers list -v` with real-time daemon status information
fetched via the daemon socket. When verbose mode is enabled, each worker
displays additional live metrics:

Circuit breaker state:
- Closed (green): normal operation
- HalfOpen (yellow): testing recovery
- Open (red): worker isolated due to failures

Slot usage:
- Shows used/total slots (green when idle, yellow when busy)

Worker status:
- Healthy, Degraded, Unreachable, Draining, Disabled

Error reporting:
- Last error message when circuit is open
- Recovery countdown in seconds

Implementation:
- DaemonFullStatusResponse: new struct for /status endpoint
- extract_json_body(): helper for daemon response parsing
- Conditional fetch only in verbose mode to avoid latency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
